title: Smelted Leather
description: Have you ever hated that some undeads only drop rotten flesh?
body:
# Description
Have you ever hated that some undeads only drop rotten flesh? and have you always been running out of leather?

Well, Smelted Leather is a Light weight datapack that allows you to Smelt, Smoke and Campfire Cook any rotten flesh, in to fresh leather!



### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
